allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/chat/stream -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"channel":"test","chatId":"123","content":"北京天气怎么样？"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"channel":"test","chatId":"123","content":"北京天气怎么样？"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"channel":"test","chatId":"123","content":"你有什么工具"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat -H "Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8" -d "{\\"channel\\":\\"test\\",\\"chatId\\":\\"123\\",\\"content\\":\\"what tools do you have\\"}")
Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat/stream/steps -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"message\\":\\"北京天气怎么样？\\"}")
Bash(curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/chat/stream/steps -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"message":"What is the weather in Beijing?"}')
